defs: Corresponding in form, character, opinions, etc.; similar; like; consistent; proper or suitable; -- usually followed by to.
quotes: The fragments of Sappho give us a taste of her way of writing perfectly conformable with that character.
I have been to you a true and humble wife, at all times to your will conformable
Conformable to Scripture as well as to philosophy.
To make matters somewhat conformable for the old knight.

defs: Disposed to compliance or obedience; ready to follow directions; quick to comply; submissive; compliant.
quotes: I have been to you a true and humble wife, At all times to your will conformable.

defs: Parallel, or nearly so; -- said of strata in contact.
